data.body:
## Adversarial Review Findings Applied

### [Compatibility] framework_type token does not exist in codebase
The codebase uses `stack` (from detect-stack.sh) with values like `python-poetry`, `node-npm`, `unknown`. There is no `framework_type` field. The registry's framework_type values should map to detect-stack.sh output tokens. Clarify whether to extend detect-stack.sh (see story e0bc-c94f) or add a new field.

### Done Definition Update: detect-stack.sh token mapping
After template install, detect-stack.sh must return a recognized stack token: NextJS → node-npm, Flask → python-poetry, Rails → ruby-rails (new, see e0bc-c94f), Jekyll → ruby-jekyll (new, see e0bc-c94f).

### [Compatibility] Phase 2 skip changes the skill's phase contract
Skipping Phase 2 means config values normally gathered in dialogue (commands, architecture, CI, design, enforcement) must all be inferred. Verify Phase 3 can operate without Phase 2 scratchpad data, or define which values the template registry provides as defaults.
